home.description: Humanity lives within enormous walled cities to protect themselves from monstrous, man-eating Titans. The gripping narrative follows Eren Yeager and his friends as they join the military to fight for survival and uncover the dark truths of their world.
home.desc: Humanity lives within enormous walled cities to protect themselves from monstrous, man-eating Titans. The gripping narrative follows Eren Yeager and his friends as they join the military to fight for survival and uncover the dark truths of their world.
home.title: A.O.T
Attack on titan
home.desc: Humanity lives within cities protected by enormous walls to shield themselves from gigantic, man-eating humanoids known as Titans. The story follows Eren Yeager, his adopted sister Mikasa Ackerman, and his friend Armin Arlert, whose lives are forever changed after a Colossal Titan breaches their home district, leading them to join the Survey Corps to fight back.
home.description: Humanity lives within cities protected by enormous walls to shield themselves from gigantic, man-eating humanoids known as Titans. The story follows Eren Yeager, his adopted sister Mikasa Ackerman, and his friend Armin Arlert, whose lives are forever changed after a Colossal Titan breaches their home district, leading them to join the Survey Corps to fight back.

home.desc: A young man named Ken Kaneki barely survives an encounter with a ghoul, only to find himself transformed into a half-ghoul. He must now navigate a secret world where ghouls live among humans, constantly battling his hunger while trying to maintain his humanity.
home.title: tokyo ghoul
home.description: A young man named Ken Kaneki barely survives an encounter with a ghoul, only to find himself transformed into a half-ghoul. He must now navigate a secret world where ghouls live among humans, constantly battling his hunger while trying to maintain his humanity.

home.title: tokyo revengers
home.description: Takemichi Hanagaki's mundane life takes a drastic turn when he discovers his ex-girlfriend, Hinata Tachibana, has been murdered by the notorious Tokyo Manji Gang. He suddenly gains the ability to time travel twelve years into the past, embarking on a perilous mission to infiltrate the gang and rewrite history to save Hinata and his friends.
